creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I can't confirm. I have no FreeBSD 11.X to check or test, I'm running CURRENT. On CURRENT poudriere, graphics/qgis compiles.

On CURRENT with an existing installation, qgis fails to build due to grass7 build failure which is due to a failure in pdal, which doesn't build or update when already  installed.
